title: 200 X 8oz / 240ml Kraft Triple Walled Disposable Paper Ripple Cups Coffee Tea Cup Disposable Hot Drink Cups + 200 X LIDS
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: HOT RIPPLE CUPS: Triple-layered ripple cup designs are perfect for your coffee and tea serving needs, which give a convenient grip for a hot drink on the go.
FEATURES: Easy to carry hot beverages; non-slip grip cups; leak-proof lids; disposable; extra strong; recyclable.
Colour: brown; SIZE: 8oz (240ml); TYPE: Tripple wall insulated paper cup; QTY: 200 cups with lids
MULTIPURPOSE: Cups are designed for any hot drink. Perfect for takeaway from coffee shops and cafes; also suitable for parties, picnics, camping, weddings, etc.
MADE FOR RECYCLING: Disposable cups can be completely recyclable after use, which is also the best alternative to other hazardous material cups.

Disposable Brown Ripple Coffee Cups Merchant video STYLISH RIPPLE CUPS THAT ELEVATE YOUR SIP Whether for personal use or professional service add a touch of class and practicality to every coffee moment. BUILT FOR EVERYDAY EXCELLENCE Designed for home, work, and travel, our cups ensure your hot drinks stay fresh and enjoyable. Whether you’re serving guests or sipping on the go. Nationwide Paper Leak-Proof Ripple Cups Say goodbye to spills with our Brown Ripple Coffee Cups with Lids. Designed with secure lids and premium insulation, these cups ensure hot drinks stay hot while keeping your hands cool. Ideal for takeaway coffee, travel, and events.
